description: Looks up raw and sanity-filtered odometer fields for one exact Danish registration number. Use when a user asks about mileage, odometer readings, whether odometer data is documented, or why mileage may look suspicious.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-vehicles-flat | WHERE plate == ?registration_number | KEEP plate, vehicle_id, brand, model, first_reg_date, inspection_date, inspection_type, odometer_km_raw, inspection_odometer_km_sane, engine_odometer_km_raw, engine_odometer_km_sane, engine_odometer_documented, engine_odometer_unavailable | LIMIT 10

registration_number.description: Exact Danish registration number, for example EN44360
